Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class AppointmentAssignmentPolicy

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.AppointmentAssignmentPolicy
public class AppointmentAssignmentPolicy extends Metadata

Java class for AppointmentAssignmentPolicy complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppointmentAssignmentPolicy">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="policyApplicableDuration" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PolicyApplicableDuration"/>
         <element name="policyType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AssignmentPolicyType"/>
         <element name="utilizationFactor" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}UtilizationFactor"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
